description: Use this API to run the Optimal Power Flow solution. Subsystems that have been specified will be optimized to the objectives and tolerances specified, if a solution is achievable. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = nopf(sid, all)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid bus subsystem id from 0 to 11. a bus subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
Topology error: buses exist with bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
